summary: Docker build failed when trying to download a release artifact from GitHub. The wget command received an HTTP 502 Bad Gateway error from github.com while attempting to download the nydus release package.
root_cause: HTTP 502 Bad Gateway error returned by github.com when wget attempted to download https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/v2.4.0/nydus-static-v2.4.0-linux-amd64.tgz during Docker build step [nydus 1/2]

evidence.quote: wget: server returned error: HTTP/1.1 502 Bad Gateway or Proxy Error
evidence.reason: Explicit indication that the wget command failed due to a 502 server error from github.com

evidence.quote: ERROR: process "/bin/bash -c wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/$NYDUS_VERSION/nydus-static-$NYDUS_VERSION-$TARGETOS-$TARGETARCH.tgz" did not complete successfully: exit code: 1
evidence.reason: Shows the build step failed when trying to download the nydus release from GitHub releases
Confirms the connection was established to the server before receiving the 502 error

suggested_fix: Retry the CI job, as HTTP 502 errors are typically transient. If failures persist, verify that the nydus release file (v2.4.0) is still available at https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases or check GitHub's service status.

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-14 F2 fix. The Claude shim now persists _model_info from every API call; this row predates that emit so resolved_model and usage are not recoverable. requested_model is set to the shim-level alias (haiku for v1, sonnet for v2) which is what the post-fix shim emits.

summary: A single functional test failed due to network errors when attempting to download from GitHub. The test was retried but still failed with repeated 502 Bad Gateway responses from github.com.
root_cause: GitHub is returning 502 Bad Gateway responses when the test attempts to download from https://github.com/pypa/pip-test-package/archive/refs/heads/master.zip. The HTTPSConnectionPool exceeded max retries due to ResponseError('too many 502 error responses').

evidence.quote: ERROR: Could not install packages due to an OSError: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='github.com', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: /pypa/pip-test-package/archive/refs/heads/master.zip (Caused by ResponseError('too many 502 error responses'))
evidence.reason: Explicit network error from GitHub returning 502 (Bad Gateway) responses; the connection pool exceeded max retries attempting to contact github.com
Test was rerun (indicating flakiness) and still failed with the same network error, suggesting external service issue rather than code defect

evidence.quote: 1 failed, 1080 passed, 44 skipped, 21 xfailed, 2 xpassed in 451.05s
evidence.reason: Only 1 out of 1148 functional tests failed; unit tests passed 1753/1753, indicating code is functional and issue is isolated to network/external service

suggested_fix: This is a transient GitHub service issue. Retry the test run, as the pip code itself is working correctly (1753 unit tests and 1080 functional tests passed).

summary: One test suite failed during Jest test execution. The test suite at test/config/get.ts encountered a failure at line 32:38, causing the overall test run to exit with code 1 after 1 failed and 475 passed tests.
root_cause: A test assertion in test/config/get.ts failed at line 32, column 38, causing the Jest test suite to fail.

evidence.quote: Test Suites: 1 failed, 3 skipped, 61 passed, 62 of 65 total
evidence.reason: Indicates one test suite failed while the majority passed, pointing to a specific test failure
Shows exactly one test assertion failed out of 485 total tests
Stack trace explicitly identifies the file and location of the test failure
Confirms jest exited with status 1 due to test failure in the recursive run

suggested_fix: Investigate the test assertion at test/config/get.ts:32:38 to understand what condition failed and correct either the test or the code being tested.
